notes: Fixes the case where the service nav_main node could be selected instead of the real main node for route main:home.
main:home now always resolves to node_key=main; nav_main is treated only as a navigation label.
Clean V3 comments post actions from CC6.5.8.0 remain included.
Callback payload r/route/action still cannot overwrite the new target route.
Post registry sync remains active; new posts with Comments button appear in ak_posts and in Choose post.
Single active menu remains enabled and activeMenu message_id is tracked.
